entities.name: TYMOVIRUS
entities.description: A virus that infects groundnut and other host species

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Arachis hypogaea L., a legume crop infected by Tymovirus

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Tymovirus infection was reported

entities.name: MOSAIC MOTTLE
entities.description: A symptom of the disease observed on groundnut leaves

entities.name: YELLOWING SYMPTOMS
entities.description: A symptom of the disease observed on groundnut leaves

entities.name: PATACHERU
entities.description: A location in Andhra Pradesh, India, where the disease was observed

entities.name: ANDHRA PRADESH
entities.description: A state in India where the disease was observed

entities.name: MECHANICAL SAP INOCULATION
entities.description: A method used to transmit the disease from plant to plant

entities.name: FABACEAE
entities.description: A plant family that serves as a host for the virus

entities.name: CHENOPODIACEAE
entities.description: A plant family that serves as a host for the virus

entities.name: TYMOVIRUS DISEASE
entities.description: A disease characterized by mosaic mottle and yellowing symptoms caused by Tymovirus
